g.text: Forma Luna ť Client-facing Wireframe (Studio + Trade)
Import to Figma: drag this SVG in. Also import `figma-logo.png` + `figma-gateway-hero.png` (included beside this SVG) if you want to swap local assets inside Figma.
Home page: one hero image, no mid-CTA (header CTA only)
Studio projects + curated products for clients. Trade portal for approved professionals.
Kicker sits bottom-left: ťArchitectural lighting studio + trade portfolioť
D3 ť Trade: Login / Request access
Sign in to view pricing and allocation.
State A: not logged in / not approved ť State B: approved shows pricing
State A ť Login to see pricing
State A: Login/approval required ť Login to see pricing .
State B: Approved user ť show price + currency.
Same screens, simplified layout. Two key pricing states shown in Trade list/detail.
State A: login to see pricing
Notes: This is a low-fidelity wireframe board. Next iteration can add your exact copy, brand typography, and real image placeholders.
